description: Fix CI running twice for PRs by scoping push trigger to main branch only

userStories.title: Scope CI push trigger to main branch only
userStories.description: As a developer, I want CI to run only once per code change so that I don't see duplicate checks and waste CI resources.
acceptanceCriteria: The push trigger in .github/workflows/ci.yml is scoped to main branch only (branches: ['main'])
The pull_request trigger remains for all branches (branches: ['**'])
All existing CI steps (lint, typecheck, test) remain unchanged
